Id1.text: Acta Mathematica Hungarica is the publisher of Springer Science+Business Media, founded by Julius Springer.

Id2.text: Springer Science and Business Media, founded by Julius Springer, publishes Acta Mathematica Hungarica.

Id3.text: Springer Science+Business Media founded by Julius Springer is the publisher of Acta Mathematica Hungarica.
